headline: RBC and Live Nation Canada Launch Avion Rewards Points Redemption for Ticketmaster Events Across Canada
summary: Royal Bank of Canada (RBC) and Live Nation Canada today announced that Avion Rewards members can now redeem their Avion points for tickets to thousands of live events across the country on Ticketmaster.ca. This offering expands the relationship between Canada's largest proprietary loyalty program and a leading force in live entertainment, delivering seamless access to the artists and shows Canadians love.
